policy.retirement_rule: A Vite route can be retired only after the matrix marks its capability covered, Vite and Next browser evidence both pass, API contracts match, and the route has an explicit retirement decision.

entries.capability: Root route redirects to the workspace cockpit.
entries.retirement_gate: Keep both redirects until all workspace routes are replaced.

entries.capability: Operator cockpit with metrics, recent runs, tasks, and pending approvals.
entries.retirement_gate: Need side-by-side data-shape diff before retiring the Vite cockpit.

entries.capability: Pixel Office map plus local brief controls plus customer task/template dispatch; Next currently proves a read-only Pixel Operating Map, owner dispatch workflow route bridge, owner task dry-run, template async job form fallback, local-brief prepared-action exact resume with approval before live Agnesfallback execution, isolated Pro template dispatch, safe mock customer-worker dispatch/readback, Hermes/OpenClaw customer-worker prepared-action exact resume, and ledger-derived safe prepared-action resume readback.
entries.retirement_gate: Next now has pixel_office_dispatch_retirement_evidence_v1 explicit visual retirement evidence for Vite /workspace/pixel-office and Next /workspace/pixel-office plus /workspace/dispatch, and it proves read-only Pixel Operating Map parity, owner dispatch workflow route bridge, owner task dry-run, template async job form fallback, local-brief prepared-action exact resume with approval-required, hash-mismatch, consume, and replay guards, Free Local blocking, isolated Pro template entitlement dispatch, safe mock customer-worker dispatch/job readback, and Hermes/OpenClaw customer-worker prepared-action exact resume with approval-required, hash-mismatch, consume, replay guards, and ledger-derived safe resume_form readback; route retirement still requires an explicit route retirement commit that preserves /workspace/pixel-office deep links, updates this matrix, reruns Vite/Next browser evidence, and keeps Agent Gateway CLI/API/MCP unchanged.

entries.capability: Task list and task status triage.
entries.retirement_gate: Need visual/action parity review for filters before retirement; list-to-detail links now have route-level parity evidence.

entries.capability: Task detail with linked runs, approvals, evaluations, memories, and artifacts.
entries.retirement_gate: Explicit route retirement executed for task_detail: Vite primary/internal task-detail links now use /workspace/tasks/:id, the legacy Vite /admin/tasks/:id route is a redirect-only deep link, Next /admin/tasks/:taskId remains a redirect alias to /workspace/tasks/:taskId, and Vite/Next browser evidence must keep both canonical workspace rendering and admin deep-link compatibility green.

entries.capability: AI employee registry, focused worker console, worker readiness, fleet readback, hygiene preview, local worker controls, remote enrollment, and customer dispatch.
entries.retirement_gate: Next now covers the Worker Console through split routes: /workspace/agents renders agent registry, production security, safe mock worker dispatch, mock daemon start/restart/stop, stuck-task release, approval-gated enrollment request, and Agent Gateway session hygiene readback; /workspace/workers proves worker_console_read_model_parity for worker status, /workers/fleet lanes, /workers/fleet/hygiene fleet hygiene read-only preview, adapter readiness, safe session refs, local readiness proof, and /operator/execution-mode read-only adapter route/confirm-run/prepared-action wall readback. The Worker Console coverage boundary states Agent Gateway CLI/API/MCP remains canonical for token issue/rotate/revoke, session lifecycle, live daemon lifecycle, live dispatch controls, cleanup mutation, and detailed operator mutation. Next rejects non-mock proxy/form dispatch with mock_only_next_parity, rejects non-mock/live daemon controls with mock_daemon_only_next_parity and live_worker_daemon_not_allowed_next_parity, rejects force release with force_release_not_allowed_next_parity, blocks raw enrollment token issue routes with enrollment_token_issue_not_allowed_next_parity, and blocks Agent Gateway session create/session revoke/enrollment revoke lifecycle writes with gateway_lifecycle_write_not_allowed_next_parity. The ui_covered_route_retirement_packet_v1 packet records this as a candidate-only future same-path ownership cutover requirement while Vite /workspace/agents route retirement remains blocked until an explicit route retirement commit preserves deep links, reruns Vite/Next browser evidence, and keeps Agent Gateway CLI/API/MCP unchanged.

entries.capability: Per-agent performance detail.
entries.retirement_gate: Explicit route retirement executed for /admin/agents/:id -> /workspace/agents/:id: Vite primary navigation now uses the workspace route, the legacy admin route is redirect-only for deep links, Next workspace parity remains covered, browser evidence must be rerun, and Agent Gateway CLI/API/MCP remains unchanged. Next agent detail covers live per-agent performance, budget, allowed tools, recent runs, run/task links, and error groups; Vite /admin/agents/:id now redirects to /workspace/agents/:id.

entries.capability: Approval inbox and approve/reject decisions.
entries.retirement_gate: Need route-level Vite/Next decision side-effect diff before retirement.

entries.capability: Memory candidate review and approve/reject decisions.
entries.retirement_gate: Need route-level Vite/Next decision side-effect diff before retirement.

entries.capability: Customer delivery board and customer project index.
entries.retirement_gate: Need side-by-side route read-model diff for project and delivery board counts before retirement.

entries.capability: Customer project delivery report, report artifact archive, and Agent Plan evidence.
entries.retirement_gate: Next browser evidence now opens the created report, Agent Plan evidence, manifest drilldown, linked task, and linked run after isolated Pro template dispatch, but Vite route retirement still needs explicit side-by-side archive and visible evidence parity.

entries.capability: Run ledger list.
entries.retirement_gate: Explicit route retirement executed for run_ledger: Vite primary/internal run-ledger links now use /workspace/runs, the legacy Vite /admin/runs route is a redirect-only deep link, Next /admin/runs remains a redirect alias to /workspace/runs, and Vite/Next browser evidence must keep both canonical workspace rendering and admin deep-link compatibility green.

entries.capability: Run detail with graph, tool calls, approvals, evaluations, artifacts, and token omission proof.
entries.retirement_gate: Explicit route retirement executed for run_detail: Vite primary/internal run-detail links now use /workspace/runs/:id, the legacy Vite /admin/runs/:id route is a redirect-only deep link, Next /admin/runs/:runId remains a redirect alias to /workspace/runs/:runId, and Vite/Next browser evidence must keep both canonical workspace rendering and admin deep-link compatibility green.

entries.capability: Tool call ledger.
entries.retirement_gate: Explicit route retirement executed for /admin/toolcalls -> /workspace/tool-calls: Vite primary navigation now uses the workspace route, the legacy admin route is redirect-only for deep links, Next workspace parity remains covered, browser evidence must be rerun, and Agent Gateway CLI/API/MCP remains unchanged. Next read-only tool call ledger covers list/risk/status/run-link parity; Vite /admin/toolcalls now redirects to /workspace/tool-calls.

entries.capability: Evaluation case and quality gate console.
entries.retirement_gate: Explicit route retirement executed for /admin/evaluations -> /workspace/evaluations: Vite primary navigation now uses the workspace route, the legacy admin route is redirect-only for deep links, Next workspace parity remains covered, browser evidence must be rerun, and Agent Gateway CLI/API/MCP remains unchanged. Next read-only evaluation ledger covers score/pass-fail/evaluator/run/task-link parity; Vite /admin/evaluations now redirects to /workspace/evaluations.

entries.capability: Admin dashboard and control tower.
entries.retirement_gate: Next now has split-route control tower proof: /workspace renders live /dashboard/metrics cockpit readback including runtime health, OpenClaw import, task status, cost leaders, failure/cost/memory/approval KPIs; /workspace/agents carries the agent performance drilldown from GET /agents; /workspace/governance renders production, RBAC, session, and audit evidence; and /workspace/deployment renders BYOC storage, backup, retention, signed export, and connector-policy gates. The ui_covered_route_retirement_packet_v1 packet records this as a candidate-only route-retirement packet that still needs an /admin deep-link redirect or alias. Vite /admin remains until an explicit route retirement commit preserves deep links, reruns Vite/Next browser evidence, and keeps Agent Gateway CLI/API/MCP unchanged.

entries.capability: Runtime connector status and trust updates.
entries.retirement_gate: Explicit route retirement executed for /admin/connectors -> /workspace/connectors: Vite primary navigation now uses the workspace route, the legacy admin route is redirect-only for deep links, Next workspace parity remains covered, browser evidence must be rerun, and Agent Gateway CLI/API/MCP remains unchanged. Next runtime connectors parity covers live connector status, allow-real-run and confirm gates, trust mutation fallback, and connector audit evidence; Vite /admin/connectors now redirects to /workspace/connectors.

entries.capability: External base and Notion sync controls.
entries.retirement_gate: Explicit route retirement executed for /admin/bases/notion -> /workspace/external-bases/notion: Vite primary navigation now uses the workspace route, the legacy admin route is redirect-only for deep links, Next workspace parity remains covered, browser evidence must be rerun, and Agent Gateway CLI/API/MCP remains unchanged. Next Notion External Base parity covers live status, preview-only report evidence, dry-run export, Free Local confirmed-export entitlement blocking, and Next export fallback; Vite /admin/bases/notion now redirects to /workspace/external-bases/notion.

entries.capability: Template catalog and base switching administration.
entries.retirement_gate: Explicit route retirement executed for /admin/templates -> /workspace/templates: Vite primary navigation now uses the workspace route, the legacy admin route is redirect-only for deep links, Next workspace parity remains covered, browser evidence must be rerun, and Agent Gateway CLI/API/MCP remains unchanged. Next now covers template dispatch plus /workspace/templates live template/base switching readback from /template-packages, /template-bindings, /bases, and /migration/preview with local-ledger protection and preview-only external base migration evidence. Vite /admin/templates now redirects to /workspace/templates while Agent Gateway CLI/API/MCP remains unchanged.

entries.capability: Audit evidence ledger.
entries.retirement_gate: Explicit route retirement executed for /admin/audit -> /workspace/audit: Vite primary navigation now uses the workspace route, the legacy admin route is redirect-only for deep links, Next workspace parity remains covered, browser evidence must be rerun, and Agent Gateway CLI/API/MCP remains unchanged. Vite /admin/audit now redirects to /workspace/audit; deeper hash-chain and pagination improvements remain future page-quality work, not route-retirement blockers.

entries.capability: Commercial edition, capability matrix, and fail-closed gates.
entries.retirement_gate: No Vite route is replaced; this is a commercial migration addition.

entries.capability: Production readiness, workspace/RBAC/session governance, and audit evidence.
entries.retirement_gate: No Vite route is replaced; this is a commercial governance addition.

entries.capability: Local/BYOC deployment readiness, backup/restore evidence, configured retention/export gates, Enterprise SSO/private connector gates, and storage backend status.
entries.retirement_gate: No Vite route is replaced; this is a BYOC/deployment migration addition.

entries.capability: Agent Plan evidence drilldown with manifest verification, plan verification, run graph, and task/run links.
entries.retirement_gate: No Vite route is replaced; this adds evidence visibility required before route retirement.

entries.capability: TypeScript-owned Postgres Agent Gateway task, plan, run lifecycle, and execution-evidence control plane.
entries.retirement_gate: These exact routes are a commercial control-plane migration addition. Python remains Free Local and the explicit per-route rollback until broader API parity is proven.

entries.capability: Next.js API proxy preserving current MIS API semantics.
api_contracts: POST /api/mis/agent-gateway/enrollment/create -> AGENTOPS_API_BASE blocked before upstream by enrollment_token_issue_not_allowed_next_parity
POST /api/mis/workflows/customer-worker-task -> AGENTOPS_API_BASE/workflows/customer-worker-task with prepared-action exact-resume guard for Hermes/OpenClaw
POST /api/mis/workflows/customer-worker-task/submit -> AGENTOPS_API_BASE/workflows/customer-worker-task/submit with prepared-action exact-resume guard for Hermes/OpenClaw
GET /api/mis/workflows/customer-worker-prepared-actions -> AGENTOPS_API_BASE/workflows/customer-worker-prepared-actions with safe customer-worker prepared-action projection
POST /api/mis/workflows/local-brief -> AGENTOPS_API_BASE/workflows/local-brief with prepared-action exact-resume guard
entries.retirement_gate: Proxy must remain a compatibility layer until backend/API ownership changes through a separate gate; raw enrollment token mint routes are blocked in Next until a dedicated approval/token handling slice exists.
